SLK Development Presents

Coastal Vision 2030

Interactive investor map focused on SLK’s landmark destinations in Larnaca, with selected lifestyle and city-value anchors.
SLK first.
Horizon District, Lumina Mare and the coastal collection are the main story. Marina, Land of Tomorrow, Salus and the East Coast lifestyle layer support the investment narrative.
SLK logos mark SLK destinations only. Education and lifestyle points are shown as small support markers.
City anchors and lifestyle points are shown as neutral support layers.
